planner.name: Requirement Analysis
planner.purpose: Analyze user intent, target paths, required docs, risks, and repeat patterns before execution.

planner.name: Task Planning
planner.purpose: Split the request into bounded steps with explicit handoffs.

implementer.name: Bounded Implementation
implementer.purpose: Apply narrow changes through the tool gateway after required documents are acknowledged.

implementer.name: Constraint Application
implementer.purpose: Use extracted document constraints while editing or running tools.

reviewer.name: Quality Review
reviewer.purpose: Check changed files, validation output, missing scope, and consistency.

reviewer.name: Browser Verification
reviewer.purpose: Use Playwright MCP for UI-impacting work and record validation.completed results.

reviewer.name: Fallback Routing
reviewer.purpose: Decide whether to complete, remind, fix immediately, or recommend a specialist fixer.

fixer.name: Targeted Remediation
fixer.purpose: Repair validation failures and repeated findings without broad rewrites.
